channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni set to rest Saquon Barkley in finale and end chance at NFL rushing record
item.description: Saquon Barkley appears set to sit out the Philadelphia Eagles final regular-season game Sunday, denying the running back his chance at breaking Eric Dickerson’s NFL single-season rushing record.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jeanty falls short of record as dream season gets stuffed by Penn State defense in CFP loss
item.description: Ashton Jeanty took the handoff on Boise State’s first play and made it just a few steps before being greeted by a wall of dark blue Penn State jerseys that swallowed him up and shoved him backward for no gain.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Women's rights activists call for England to forfeit championship cricket match to Afghanistan
item.description: Women's rights activists have called for England's cricket team to forfeit its championship match against Afghanistan in February.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lamar Jackson vs Josh Allen MVP debate divides NFL media
item.description: The NFL MVP race between Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen and Baltimore Ravens quarterback Lamar Jackson is coming down to the final week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Quinn Ewers has massive offer to leave Texas, enter transfer portal after season: report
item.description: Texas Longhorns quarterback Quinn Ewers reportedly has a massive offer on the table for him to leave school next year and enter the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Washington Commanders complete a turnaround from 4-13 to making the playoffs behind Jayden Daniels
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — Moments after the Washington Commanders finished the 2023 season at 4-13 and locked up the second pick in the draft, Daron Payne was already feeling optimistic about the organization's long-term future.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wimbledon finalist Gabriela Dabrowski reveals she played through 2024 after breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: Former U.S. Open women's doubles champion Gabriela Dabrowski revealed on Tuesday she had played through 2024 after undergoing treatment for breast cancer. She delayed part of that treatment so she could compete at Wimbledon where she reached the doubles final.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: VIDEO: A jet carrying the Gonzaga men's basketball team ordered to stop to avoid collision at LAX
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Federal Aviation Administration has launched an investigation after a private jet carrying the Gonzaga University men’s basketball team nearly crossed a runway as another flight was taking off Friday at Los Angeles International Airport.
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lions beat the 49ers 40-34 in a tune-up for Week 18 division showdown
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The big prizes for the Detroit Lions remain on the horizon, with the team seeking a division title, the top seed in the NFC playoffs and the franchise's first Super Bowl trip.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jayden Daniels dazzles again as Commanders clinch a playoff spot by beating Falcons 30-24 in OT
item.description: Jayden Daniels connected with Zach Ertz in overtime for his third touchdown pass of the game to clinch a playoff spot by beating the Atlanta Falcons 30-24 in overtime Sunday night in a back-and-forth prime-time showdown between highly drafted rookie quarterbacks.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFC's No. 1 seed comes down to Vikings-Lions showdown at Detroit in Week 18
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed will come down to the final game of the regular season when the Detroit Lions host the Minnesota Vikings next Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing as Eagles beat Cowboys 41-7 to clinch NFC East
item.description: Barkley rushed for 167 yards to top 2,000 on the season, backup quarterback Kenny Pickett ran and threw for scores before departing with injured ribs, and the Eagles clinched the division title by routing the Dallas Cowboys 41-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lakers send D'Angelo Russell to Nets in trade for Dorian Finney-Smith, Shake Milton
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers have traded guard D'Angelo Russell to the Brooklyn Nets for forward Dorian Finney-Smith and guard Shake Milton. The Lakers also sent forward Maxwell Lewis and three second-round draft picks to Brooklyn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs deal former 1B prospect Matt Mervis to Marlins for utilityman
item.description: The Cubs have traded one former infield prospect for another. ESPN's Jeff Passan reported on his X feed early Sunday afternoon that the Cubs have dealt first baseman Matt Mervis to the Miami Marlins for utilityman Vidal Bruján, according to sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU crushes Colorado in Alamo Bowl, 36-14
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (AP) - L.J. Martin rushed for 93 yards and two touchdowns, Jake Retzlaff passed for 151 yards, and No. 17 BYU beat 20th-ranked Colorado 36-14 in the Alamo Bowl on Saturday night. “Understanding that they have great players on the other side of the field," Martin said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giddey's triple-double sends Bulls to 116-111 win over Bucks
item.description: Josh Giddey had 23 points, 15 rebounds and 10 assists for his second triple-double this season to lead the Chicago Bulls to a 116-111 win over the Milwaukee Bucks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers' Ohtani and wife will soon be welcoming a baby to the family
item.description: Between a marriage announcement, third MVP award and World Series title, Los Angeles Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani had a pretty good 2024. And now, it looks like 2025 may be even better for the Japanese two-way baseball phenom.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Lehkonen gets hat trick as Colorado beats Utah, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's struggles on its home ice continue. Artturi Lehkonen scored his first NHL hat trick, and the Colorado Avalanche won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center in Salt Lake City on Friday. Utah lost all three games on this current homestand.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Shaq Barrett expected to re-sign with Bucs after being waived by Dolphins, reports say
item.description: Former Tampa Bay Buccaneers linebacker Shaq Barrett is expected to once again sign with the Bucs after he was waived by the Miami Dolphins, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tuch scores hat trick, Sabres beat Blackhawks 6-2 for 2nd straight win after 13-game skid
item.description: Alex Tuch scored a hat trick for the Buffalo Sabres in a 6-2 win against the Chicago Blackhawks on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday Bowl to kick off at brand-new Snapdragon Stadium for the first time
item.description: The Holiday Bowl has been woven into the fabric of San Diego for four decades. For a football city without a professional sports team, there is even more excitement surrounding this annual event.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5
